defs: see 螳臂當車|螳臂当车[tang2 bi4 dang1 che1]
lit. a mantis trying to stop a chariot (idiom)
fig. to overrate oneself and attempt sth impossible
the mantis stalks the cicada, unaware of the oriole behind (idiom, from Daoist classic Zhuangzi 莊子|庄子[Zhuang1 zi3]); to pursue a narrow gain while neglecting a greater danger

pinyin: tang2 lang2 bu3 chan2 , huang2 que4 zai4 hou4
defs: the mantis stalks the cicada, unaware of the oriole behind (idiom, from Daoist classic Zhuangzi 莊子|庄子[Zhuang1 zi3]); to pursue a narrow gain while neglecting a greater danger
